description: If an ITR is not filed by the due date (July 31, 2026 for most individuals/HUF), a belated return can be filed u/s 139(4) up to December 31, 2026. Attracts late filing fee u/s 234F and forfeits loss carry-forward benefits.

lateFee.feeStructure: ₹5,000 if total income > ₹5 lakh; ₹1,000 if total income ≤ ₹5 lakh; NIL if income below basic exemption limit
lateFee.note: Late fee mandatory — cannot be waived. In addition to interest u/s 234A.

interestOnLateFiling.from: August 1, 2026 (day after original due date for individuals)
interestOnLateFiling.base: Tax due minus TDS minus advance tax

lossesForfeited.note: FORFEITED — cannot be carried forward if return is belated
FORFEITED if return filed after due date
FORFEITED if return filed after due date
CAN be carried forward even with belated return — special provision

lossesForfeited.lossType: House property loss set-off in current year
lossesForfeited.note: Current-year HP loss can still be set off against other income even in belated return

steps.description: Form 16, Form 16A, bank statements, FD interest certificates, investment proofs, property documents. Calculate total income for FY 2025-26.

steps.stepName: Compute total tax and pay outstanding dues
steps.description: Compute: total income tax + interest u/s 234A (from Aug 1) + interest u/s 234B (if advance tax < 90%) + late fee u/s 234F. Pay via Challan 280 (self-assessment tax).

steps.stepName: File belated return on e-filing portal
steps.description: Login → File Income Tax Return → AY 2026-27 → Select 'Belated Return u/s 139(4)'. Enter challan details. Complete and submit.
Unverified belated return is treated as not filed at all. E-verify via Aadhaar OTP, EVC, or DSC within 30 days of filing.

afterDeadline.description: If belated return deadline (Dec 31) also missed, taxpayer can file updated return u/s 139(8A) within 2 years from end of AY. Must pay additional tax: 25% of tax+interest (if filed within 12 months) or 50% (if filed between 12-24 months). Cannot reduce previously declared income.

commonMistakes: Not paying interest u/s 234A before filing — portal may show mismatch
Assuming belated return has same benefits as timely return — loss carry-forward is critical difference
Filing after December 31, 2026 — only updated return option remains (with extra 25-50% tax)
Not e-verifying within 30 days — belated return becomes invalid
consequences: Interest u/s 234A: 1% per month from August 1, 2026 to filing date
Business and capital losses forfeited for carry-forward
If belated return deadline also missed: Only updated return option with 25-50% additional tax
